name: Washed Ashore Supplies
readAloud: Among the broken timber and seaweed, something useful catches your eye.

checks.success: Finds a sealed crate of basic supplies.

notes: Useful early survival reward. Add rope, rations, waterskin or basic tools.

name: Giant Crab Scavengers
readAloud: The wreckage shifts. Something hard and many-legged scrapes across the stones.

checks.success: Notices the crabs before they close in.

name: Carnivorous Vines
readAloud: The jungle ahead is still. Too still. Thick vines hang between the trees like ropes.

checks.success: Spots the vines moving against the breeze.

notes: Use as restraint hazard. Fire scares the vines back.

name: Velociraptor Stalkers
readAloud: The birdsong cuts off all at once. Somewhere in the green, claws click softly against stone.

checks.success: Notices movement circling through the undergrowth.

notes: Teach pack tactics. They test the party before committing.

name: Distant Apex Roar
readAloud: A roar rolls across the jungle, so deep you feel it in your ribs. Birds explode from the canopy.

checks.success: Realises the sound came from something enormous, but not close yet.

notes: Do not force combat at level 3. Use as pressure and direction control.
